title: State Dept. Said to Order Diplomats in Saudi Arabia to Leave
summary_full: The ordered departure of U.S. employees in the kingdom indicates that senior diplomats are bracing for a possible surge in violence in the war with Iran, officials say.
summary_public: The ordered departure of U.S. employees in the kingdom indicates that senior diplomats are bracing for a possible surge in violence in the war with Iran, officials say.

IR.label: negative
IR.evidence: bracing for a possible surge in violence in the war with Iran
